hooks.command: ROOT="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)}" && python3 "$ROOT/scripts/learning_profile.py" analyze 2>/dev/null || true

ROOT="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)}" && python3 "$ROOT/scripts/index_reconcile.py" 2>/dev/null; python3 "$ROOT/scripts/cfp_fix_probe.py" 2>/dev/null || true
